assistant_message.content:
{
  "finding_id":"openscap_012",
  "rule_id": "Uninstall gssproxy Package",
  "category": "safe_to_remediate",
  "confidence": 0.88,
  "rationale": "Removing the gssproxy package does not affect SSH or console access and follows standard package removal guidance; risk of breaking dependent services can be mitigated by testing",
  "risk_factors": [
    "potential_dependency_breakage"
  ],
  "safe_next_steps": [
    "Test removal on a non-production system",
    "Verify dependent services are unaffected",
    "Document changes and maintain backup"
  ],
  "requires_reboot": false,
  "touches_authn_authz": false,
  "touches_networking": false,
  "touches_filesystems": false
}
